entities.name: CGIAR
entities.description: Consultative Group on International Agricultural Research, an organization focusing on agricultural research

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: INPUT-USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The efficiency with which agricultural inputs are utilized to produce output

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of altering the genetic makeup of crops to improve desired traits

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The management of natural resources such as land, water, and soil to ensure sustainability

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY GROWTH
entities.description: The increase in the yield or productivity of crops over time

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE USE OF NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: The use of natural resources in a way that does not deplete them for future generations

entities.name: SOILS
entities.description: The upper layer of earth in which plants grow

entities.name: WATER
entities.description: A vital natural resource required for crop growth and management

entities.name: FORESTRY
entities.description: The science and practice of planting, managing, and caring for forests

entities.name: POVERTY REDUCTION
entities.description: The process of reducing the number of people living in poverty

entities.name: HUMAN WELFARE
entities.description: The overall well-being and quality of life of humans
